data.title: UnitedHealth Group to release earnings on 2026-01-27 with projected EPS of $2.10. Stock at $356.26, down 34.33% in 52 weeks. Analysts predict 14.17% upside potential with 7 Outperform ratings.
data.description: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Tuesday, 2026-01-27, with analysts expecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.10. Investors are eager for news on surpassing estimates and guidance for the next quarter, as past performance has shown mixed outcomes with price drops despite positive earnings reports. The stock is currently trading at $356.26, down 34.33% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given UnitedHealth Group an overall Outperform rating, with an average price target of $404.71, indicating a 14.17% potential upside. This news highlights the significance of guidance and market sentiments for stock price movements.

data.title: 2026 Axxess report shows 60% care at home leaders lack investment in AI. On the rise for future growth.
data.description: In Dallas, a report released on Jan. 26, 2026, highlights the crucial role artificial intelligence (AI) is projected to have in the future of home care. Surprisingly, despite this potential, the majority of organizations have not made investments in this technology, as revealed in the 2026 Axxess Industry Growth Insights Report. It states that 60% of leaders in the care at home sector have yet to allocate resources towards AI implementation. This indicates a significant gap in leveraging AI advancements within the industry.

data.title: Solo expands platform with Solo Studio for home energy contractors; secures 2 U.S. patents; Jan. 26, 2026 LEHI, Utah - PRNewswire.
data.description: A leading proposal management platform for home energy contractors, Solo, has unveiled Solo Studio - a new self-serve design platform granting contractors exceptional control over proposals. Set in LEHI, Utah, on Jan. 26, 2026, the company has also successfully obtained two U.S. patents for its innovative proposal technology. This advancement marks a significant milestone for Solo as it continues to revolutionize the industry.

data.title: Portland artist Brandon Carmody releases 50-song retrospective spanning 40 years of career. Jan. 26, 2026. Website, social media, and streaming platforms available.

The release is set to resonate with fans across various platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Amazon, Apple Music, Spotify, TikTok, and YouTube.

data.title: Palm Beach philanthropist Kimberlie Glaser joins Furry Friends Humane as Honorary Chair, boosting animal welfare efforts.

data.title: United Therapeutics reports success with Miromatrix Medical's miroliver ELAP for acute liver failure in Phase 1 study, with 5 patients treated for at least 44 hours showing survival and no serious adverse events.
data.description: United Therapeutics Corp. presented results from a phase 1 study of miroliver ELAP, an external liver assist product for acute liver failure patients. Developed by Miromatrix Medical, a subsidiary of United Therapeutics, miroliver ELAP offers temporary liver support. The bioengineered liver is created by seeding a decellularized porcine liver scaffold with human endothelial cells and liver cells. The study involved five patients who were treated with miroliver ELAP for at least 44 hours. The treatment successfully achieved its primary endpoint of patient survival during the study, with no unexpected serious adverse events reported during a 32-day follow-up period. This demonstrates the potential of miroliver ELAP in providing crucial liver support.
